2605.22054.title: LABO: LLM-Accelerated Bayesian Optimization through Broad Exploration and Selective Experimentation
2605.22054.paper_summary: The high cost and data scarcity in scientific exploration have motivated the use of large language models (LLMs) as knowledge-driven components in Bayesian optimization (BO). However, existing approaches typically embed LLMs directly into the sampling or surrogate modeling pipeline, without fully leveraging their significantly lower evaluation cost compared to real-world experiments. To address this limitation, we propose LLM-Accelerated Bayesian Optimization (LABO), a framework that combines LLM predictions with experimental observations within a single BO loop. LABO employs a gating criterion to dynamically balance the reliance on LLM predictions versus actual experiments. By leveraging inexpensive LLM evaluations to broadly explore the search space and reserving costly real experiments only for regions with high uncertainty, LABO achieves more sample-efficient optimization. We provide a theoretical analysis with a cumulative regret bound that formalizes this efficiency gain. Empirical results across diverse scientific tasks demonstrate that LABO consistently outperforms existing methods under identical experimental budgets. Our results suggest that LABO offers a practical and theoretically grounded approach for integrating LLMs into scientific discovery workflows.
2605.22054.paper_summary_zh: 高昂的成本和數據稀缺性促使在科學探索中使用大型語言模型（LLMs）作為貝葉斯優化（BO）中的知識驅動組件。<lb/>然而，現有的方法通常將LLMs直接嵌入到採樣或替代建模流程中，而未充分利用其相較於現實世界實驗顯著較低的評估成本。<lb/>為了解決這一限制，我們提出了LLM加速貝葉斯優化（LABO），這是一個將LLM預測與實驗觀察結合在單一BO循環中的框架。<lb/>LABO採用閘控標準來動態平衡對LLM預測與實際實驗的依賴。<lb/>通過利用廉價的LLM評估來廣泛探索搜索空間，並僅在高不確定性區域保留昂貴的實際實驗，LABO實現了更具樣本效率的優化。<lb/>我們提供了一個理論分析，包含一個累積後悔界限，形式化了這一效率增益。<lb/>在各種科學任務中的實證結果表明，LABO在相同的實驗預算下始終優於現有方法。<lb/>我們的結果表明，LABO為將LLMs整合到科學發現工作流程中提供了一種實用且理論上有根據的方法。
2605.22054.author: Zhuo Chen et.al.
2605.22054.authors: Zhuo Chen, Xinzhe Yuan, Jianshu Zhang, Jinzong Dong, Ruichen Zhou, Yingchun Niu, Tianhang Zhou, Yu Yang Fredrik Liu, Yuqiang Li, Nanyang Ye, Qinying Gu
